prompt: Create a cinematic travel poster photograph of Lisbon viewed from an elevated overlook in daylight, showing a wide panoramic cityscape with dense historic buildings, warm cream facades, orange terracotta rooftops, a large public square with patterned stone paving, trees, a monument column, and surrounding hills. Use a bright blue sky with scattered soft white clouds, warm natural sunlight, crisp architectural detail, and a slightly vintage travel-magazine color grade. Overlay centered typography in white: the main word “Lisbon” in very large elegant handwritten brush script across the upper middle; beneath it place a thin horizontal divider line broken by a small diamond ornament in the center; below that add the subtitle in small uppercase spaced sans-serif letters reading “A CITY OF LIGHT, COLOR AND CHARM” on two centered lines. Keep the design clean and premium, with no people as focal subjects, no borders, no logos, and no extra text.
